hero.paragraph: 3 Months of 1:1 subconscious recalibration for soul-led high-achievers ready to step into their next level.

section2.heading: You can't shake the craving you feel for MORE ….
bullets: You're successful from the outside looking in, but something feels misaligned, whether it's your relationships, your sense of self, or the quiet knowing that you're living below your true capacity.
You're constantly managing everything and everyone else around you… work, family, yourself. You deeply desire a change but worry that if you let go of control everything will fall apart.

You don't feel fully expressed and you're craving to be seen for the depth and truth of who you are, but something inside you wants to shrink when you imagine actually stepping into that next level of visibility.
You long for a life and career lived in a state of ease, to relieve your nervous system that's in constant high alert.

You've done the mindset and inner work, been to therapy, and they've helped, but you're ready to stop analyzing and start clearing the root of what's actually keeping you living the same day to day on a relentless repeat cycle.

section3.heading: You're done waiting . You're ready to thrive at a new level of happiness.
bullets: You're ready to take an honest look at your contribution to your relationship dynamics, so you can make the shifts that allow you to finally feel seen, heard, and supported by the people closest to you.
You're ready for work that creates real shifts, not just insights, without years of therapy or endless analysis, because above all, you want more time to spend with your family.
You're ready to let go of what's keeping you at your current workload or income ceiling, and create more financial success and freedom in your lifestyle.

You know it's time to step into greater visibility and success, to speak on bigger stages, grow your impact and client base , and you're ready to do it in a way where your nervous system feels safe enough to actually let it happen without depleting you.
You know deeper joy is possible in both your career and family life. You're done hustling and ready to release the guilt or shame around claiming the rest, ease and celebration you deserve.

items.quote: Stasia, After my initial call with you I instantly knew I wanted to keep working together. Before working together for 6 weeks, I was so stuck. As a "spiritual girlie" I thought I had all the answers I needed but your work peels back the layers the ego won't let go. Almost immediately my sales started increasing, my husband was back to spoiling me and even my kids were getting along better. I immediately dropped everything I was doing when you dropped your async transmissions to me because they always landed so hard for me. Questions I didn't even know I had were answered (like why I struggled to conceive for so long). I honestly don't know where I'd be on my journey if you hadn't help me collapse years of self development work into 6 weeks. I am forever Grateful to you 💚

Every time I've had a healing session with Stasia I am overcome with tears from the profound feeling of being understood. She gently uncovers deep rooted beliefs and subconscious blocks that lay within. She articulates my feelings and a "knowing" that is already in me but I could never pick at myself. When she clears blocks and brings in new healing energy, it feels like an opening, a lightness that occurs in me. I leave the session feeling more whole and secure in who I am with a lighter heart. It feels untangled. This work is deep and soul reaching and you will feel an instant shift. Absolutely recommend.

about.heading: Hi, I'm Stasia
paragraphs: I work with high-achieving, soul-led leaders who've built successful lives but know (deep down) they're living below their true capacity. I help them break through the subconscious patterns keeping them from their next level, so they can step into the ease, presence, and expansive success they've been craving in both their career and family life.
A short time ago, this was me.

My life looked incredible on paper… I had a corporate career making over $200k, a beautiful family, financial stability, and so much more. I was genuinely grateful. But underneath it all, I couldn't help but feel that there was more… more fulfillment, more freedom, more of me that I wanted to share with the world.

I liked my work, but knew I wasn't living my full truth. There were deeper parts I was hiding, like my spiritual gifts, my intuition, and the energy work I felt called to do. I didn't think my two worlds - of spirituality and business - could blend, so I kept one hidden while climbing higher in the other.
When I started working directly with my subconscious, I cleared the beliefs keeping me stuck in a role that no longer lit me up.

I feared stepping into something less defined, I was attached to external validation, I believed that I needed corporate structure to be successful. I got laid off in May 2025, and because I'd already been clearing these fears, I had a deep knowing that it was my time to pursue my soul-led work in my own business. Now I spend my days doing work that genuinely fulfills me, using my gifts to change lives, and I feel more aligned than I ever thought possible.

But it wasn't just my career that felt misaligned. I craved deeper connection in my marriage… I longed for deeper conversations where I could share more of my inner world, and we would discuss big plans for our future together. But part of me held back, fearing that digging deeper might reveal misalignment and ruin something that was already great in so many ways. I worried he wouldn't understand, or that we'd grow apart the more I pursued my own success.

I felt like I was holding everything together–managing work, our growing family, all the changes in our lives–and I was afraid that asking for more or pushing for deeper connection would risk losing what we had.
Underneath it all, it was hard to picture a future where we were both successful, both pursuing our soul-led paths, and still deeply aligned.

Through this work, I cleared my fear of being truly seen, my belief that deeper connection wasn't safe, and the subconscious story that success in one area meant sacrifice in another. And as I started doing the work on myself, I noticed huge shifts in him too... because I was no longer a match to the surface-level dynamic.

Everything shifted. Now we have the deep, aligned conversations I always craved. We talk about our shared vision, our goals, and it literally feels like we are living our dream life. I feel fully seen in my authenticity—he listens, he's so supportive, and he even asks me to do energy work on him weekly (a dream come true for me to be able to share this work with my very logical husband)!

This work has affected every part of my life. I remember a short time ago feeling like I was constantly busy, needing to juggle work, family, and everything in between. Even when I was playing with my kids, it was hard to be fully present. I felt the need to be constantly planning, managing, or controlling in order to feel productive. I feared that if I wasn't holding everything together, it would fall apart.

My subconscious believed that to be successful, I had to be busy. That I was only safe when I was in control. But the truth was, by trying to control my external reality, I was protecting myself from being vulnerable, and as a result, I wasn't letting in the people I loved the most.

Through this work, I shifted those beliefs and so many more layers around not being enough or not doing enough, along with old mother wounds, and resistance to receiving love and support. I downloaded new beliefs around ease, spaciousness, and trust. And the shift was profound.

One of the things I love most about my life now is the spaciousness and presence I have in my day-to-day… with my family, in my business, etc. I take hour-long walks with my husband almost every morning. I have plenty of guilt-free me-time (something that otherwise felt impossible as a young mom). I've created a life where rest no longer feels like a luxury I have to earn.

But arguably the deepest layer underneath it all was my fear of being fully seen. I had spent years hiding the truest parts of myself: my spiritual gifts, my intuition, and my calling. I feared judgment, rejection, and being misunderstood. I kept my spiritual side hidden from my corporate world, didn't show my face on camera, and downplayed my gifts rather than owning them. The idea of living my full truth publicly felt terrifying.

And when I cleared these deep layers, everything shifted in not only how I felt and saw myself, but also in the opportunities that started coming to me. I stopped hiding and started stepping into the fullest expression of who I am. I began sharing my gifts publicly, and opportunities I'd only dreamed of started appearing. I was invited onto 3 podcasts, including a top 5% podcast where my episode became the most-listened-to of 2025. And I spoke at a live event in front of 50+ women (something that had always been a dream of mine!). And this was all within just a few MONTHS of starting my business.

And that is exactly why I do this work: I know what it's like to have a life that looks incredible on paper, while quietly knowing you're living below your true capacity. I know what it's like to crave deeper connection, more presence, and more of yourself fully expressed, but not know how to access it. And I also know what's possible when the real blocks are finally cleared.

Now I get to share this work with others, helping them shift the dynamics in their families, step into more aligned success in their businesses, and create so much more joy, ease, and fulfillment in their everyday lives. Getting to witness those shifts in real time is the most meaningful work I've ever done. And I feel so grateful to finally be living mine.
about.secondaryButtonLabel: I'M READY FOR MORE JOYFUL SUCCESS

imagine.heading: Imagine your life with less stress and more space…
bullets: Moving through your days with ease and presence instead of stress and overwhelm. Where you trust that things will work out without needing to control every outcome. Where you can be  present without feeling unproductive, and where contentment feels like your baseline, not  something you're constantly chasing.

A deeper connection with your partner. Where the parts that quietly weren't working finally  shift. Where you feel fully seen, supported, and safe enough to be vulnerable about your deepest  needs and desires. And where your partnership grows stronger as you both step into your power.

Building success that actually feels aligned. Where you can show up as your full, authentic self in your work without fear that success comes at the expense of something else. Where you can step into bigger leadership, greater visibility, and more expansion.

Living in a version of yourself where expansion feels natural, not threatening. Where the "next level" becomes your new baseline. Where you're no longer hiding behind masks or performing for approval, but showing up as the fullest, most authentic version of yourself.

Clearing the deeper layers that have been quietly running your life. The mother wounds affecting how you show up in your relationships, subconscious blocks keeping you stuck at an income ceiling, fears around visibility or rejection that stop you from stepping into leadership, or old beliefs about what you have to sacrifice to be successful. Not just understanding these patterns, but clearing them at the root, so the change is real and lasting.

section8.heading: This work is for you if…

items.title: You're a high-achiever  who looks successful on paper but knows you're living below your true capacity.
items.body: You've done the inner work, but something deeper isn't shifting.

items.title: You want aligned success  where you can show up as your whole, authentic self without performing or hiding.
You're craving deeper connection in your relationships.  You want real intimacy, to feel truly seen and supported, and a partnership where both of you thrive together.
You're exhausted from holding everything together  and want presence, spaciousness, and guilt-free rest.
You believe in rapid transformation  and you're done waiting for slow change.  You're ready for real, root-level clearing that creates tangible, lasting shifts in your life.

You're ready to do the deeper work  with a trusted guide, to finally shift the patterns that have been running your life beneath the surface and get the kind of results that only energy work can facilitate.

truthCallout.heading: The truth is you can't solve a subconscious problem with conscious solutions.…
truthCallout.paragraph: The shifts you're craving won't come from doing more, or over-analyzing your patterns. They come from clearing the exact beliefs that shaped those patterns in the first place and shifting the energy underneath. This work accesses those deeper layers and clears them at the root. It's the reason you can see shifts in days in areas that you have been working on for years.

offer.title: The Expansion Private Mentorship
offer.description: 3 months of 1:1 subconscious recalibration for soul-led high-achievers ready to step into their next level. This is a 1:1 container where we work together to clear the subconscious patterns in the way of your next level and recalibrate your energy to match the life you're ready to create through personalized energy clearings and voice messaging.

columns.title: 6 PERSONALIZED RECORDED ENERGY HEALING TRANSMISSIONS:
items: Delivered over 3 months (every 2 weeks) as private audio recordings via Telegram
Each session is focused on what you choose to work on, whether that's continuing to go deeper on something from a previous session or addressing a completely new area

I tune into your energy to channel what's beneath the surface (the subconscious beliefs, fears, and patterns influencing the specific area you're ready to shift), and bring them to your conscious awareness
I speak the clearings directly, shifting your subconscious in real time as you listen
You only need to listen once. The shifts happen as you receive the transmission, so no repetition or daily practice required

columns.title: 3 MONTHS OF TELEGRAM VOICE MESSAGE ACCESS:
items: We'll use the space to discuss what you're experiencing, what you want to focus on next, with any relevant context about your current reality and what you're calling in.
Together we'll choose the focus for your next energy healing transmission
After you have listened to the transmissions you'll share any insights or questions that came up for you, with ongoing support between sessions
As we work together over time, the sessions naturally go deeper, building trust, uncovering new layers, and creating compounding shifts with each clearing

columns.title: GUIDED SUBCONSCIOUS MEDITATION:
items: A 3-minute guided audio to help relax your nervous system and shift you into a calm, open state before sessions (or whenever you want to deepen your connection) to set you up for success as you integrate the shifts that are unfolding in your life.

offer.investmentText:
$2,997 Pay in Full
$1040 x 3 Monthly Payments

ctaBanner.heading: You know it's time to finally celebrate receiving everything you've ever wanted
ctaBanner.paragraph: This isn't about rehashing your past or analyzing your problems. This is about going directly to the root, clearing what's blocking you at the subconscious level, and watching your reality shift as a result.

whyWorks.heading: Why I know this works:
paragraphs: I've seen first hand what's possible when you go directly to the subconscious and clear what's actually blocking you…  not just understand it, but clear it.

The reason this work creates such profound shifts is because it doesn't require you to figure it out on your own or rehash your past. I tune into the source truth of what's holding you back, access the layers beneath your awareness, and energetically shift the patterns that have been quietly running your relationships, your success, your sense of safety, etc. (after all, the subconscious runs 95% of your life!).

This work is asynchronous so that I can go as deep as needed without the limitations of a timed call, and deliver transmissions that go as deep as your energy allows. Every session creates profound shifts on its own, but working together for three months gives us the time to build compounding shifts and access deeper layers that even you may not have been aware of at the start. This work is where real, lasting change happens.
whyWorks.buttonLabel: I'M READY TO SHIFT INTO SUCCESS AND FREEDOM

closing.heading: I want you to know the life you're craving is absolutely possible.
closing.paragraph: The version of you that feels deeply present with your family, confident in your authenticity, safe in your success, and fully expressed in your work is not a distant dream. It's who you already are beneath the limiting patterns of your subconscious. You wouldn't be here if you weren't ready to release what's holding you at your current level. And that's exactly what this work is here to do. I'd be honored to support you on your journey.
